tagline: Exclusive, phone-verified leads. Pay per result. No risk to the buyer.

tone_of_voice.style: Direct, plain-spoken, math-first. No hype, no guru talk, no corporate phrasing.
tone_of_voice.personality: Trusted operator. Premium but accessible. Partner, not pushy vendor.
tone_of_voice.language: Simple British English. Conversational but professional.

messaging_pillars: 100% exclusive leads — never shared, never recycled
Pay per result: zero setup fees, zero retainers, zero ad-spend risk for buyers
Real-time delivery while intent is warm
Adjustable daily volume with consistent CPL
24-hour setup from strategy call to first lead
proof_points: OTP phone verification before every lead
Full-stack execution: ads, quiz funnel, CRM integration — all handled by CN
Client Network carries all marketing spend risk

primary_audience.description: US life insurance agents, brokers, independent producers, and small agency owners
pain_points: Burned by shared or fake leads before
Dead numbers and no contact rate
Inconsistent pipeline, hard to forecast revenue
primary_audience.decision_driver: ROI math. Cost per lead divided by contact rate divided by close rate = true cost per sale. Make the numbers work, they buy.

life-insurance.compliance: Restricted category on Meta. No income claims. Honest non-deceptive intent. Disclaimers required.

senior-care.compliance: Sensitive category. Age-related targeting restrictions on Meta. Avoid exploitative framing.

home-security.compliance: Standard category. Fear-based angles permitted within policy.

tax-relief.compliance: Financial services category. Avoid income projections and relief guarantees.

gold-ira.compliance: Financial/investment category. No return guarantees. FTC-compliant disclaimers.

traffic_channels.funnel_structure: Ad → Quiz/landing page → qualification logic → OTP phone verification → real-time delivery to buyer

kpis.not_primary: ROAS — this is a PPL model, not e-commerce. Optimise for CPL and lead quality, not revenue attribution.

visual_identity.note: No formal brand guidelines on file. Run /ads-dna against clientnetwork.io to extract visual identity before generating creatives for the first time.
visual_identity.direction: Clean, professional, direct-response. Trust-building imagery. No stock-photo clichés. Conveys credibility and operator-grade execution.
visual_identity.style: Corporate-adjacent but human. Numbers and proof over lifestyle imagery.
